message:
fix(stats): ensure CONFIG RESETSTAT clears all stat counters including new ones

- Add keyspace_hits/misses, rejected_connections, sync_full/partial_ok/partial_err,
  used_memory_peak, and net bytes to reset_info_stats()
- Expand CONFIG RESETSTAT test to verify all counters are zeroed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
